originalTitle: Thousands of anti-migrant protesters march in South Africa amid heavy police presence
title: Thousands of anti-migrant protesters march in South Africa amid heavy police presence
content: Foreigners have already left South Africa ahead of the deadline set by anti-migrant groups.

originalTitle: Bigger than Rumble in the Jungle? DR Congo bid for World Cup history
title: Bigger than Rumble in the Jungle? DR Congo bid for World Cup history
content: DR Congo's run at the 2026 World Cup comes 52 years on from both their disastrous debut at the finals and one of sport's greatest occasions held in Kinshasa.

originalTitle: Flooding hits Ghana's capital killing 13 people - with another storm forecast
title: Flooding hits Ghana's capital killing 13 people - with another storm forecast
content: People have been urged to relocate to high ground or stay indoors as more rain is expected to come.

originalTitle: ‘A rally like no other’: Trump announces 2026 Republican midterm convention
title: ‘A rally like no other’: Trump announces 2026 Republican midterm convention
content: The Republican Party is hoping to retain control of both chambers of Congress in November's midterm elections.

originalTitle: Donald Trump reports $1.4bn in cryptocurrency income in government filing
title: Donald Trump reports $1.4bn in cryptocurrency income in government filing
content: Trump has launched a slate of crypto-friendly policies since returning to the White House for a second term.

originalTitle: Venezuelans the US deported hours before earthquakes still missing
title: Venezuelans the US deported hours before earthquakes still missing
content: The US deported at least 146 people to Venezuela, just hours before two deadly earthquakes struck last Wednesday.

originalTitle: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
title: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
content: The ruling is a major setback for Donald Trump's immigration agenda, and has been welcomed by civil rights groups.

title: US Supreme Court has dealt heavy defeats to Trump, while expanding his power
content: The birthright ruling brings to an end a Supreme Court term that has delivered the president some key victories.

title: Three-year-old rescued and taken to hospital six days after Venezuela quake
content: Video footage shows rescuers cheering as the child is pulled from rubble in La Guaira state.

title: Defying logic - how Haaland could end up with 260 international goals
content: Erling Haaland delivers on the biggest stage yet for Norway - but just how many goals could he end up with in international football?

originalTitle: Koeman resigns, while Netherlands report racist abuse
title: Koeman resigns, while Netherlands report racist abuse
content: Ronald Koeman resigns as Netherlands manager after their World Cup exit, which led to "appalling" racist abuse aimed at players who missed penalties.

originalTitle: Quansah and James miss England training as right-back problems mount
title: Quansah and James miss England training as right-back problems mount
content: Jarell Quansah and Reece James miss training as England's right-back issues mount before their World Cup last-32 match against DR Congo on Wednesday.
